query: Parse the following distributed tracing log entry and extract trace_id, span_id, parent_span_id, service_name, operation_name, duration_ms, and any error fields. Note: parent_span_id may be missing for root spans.
input_document:
2024-12-15T14:32:01.847Z [INFO] trace_id=abc123def456 span_id=span_001 service=api-gateway operation=POST /v1/orders duration_ms=247 status=200
2024-12-15T14:32:01.851Z [INFO] trace_id=abc123def456 span_id=span_002 parent=span_001 service=order-service operation=create_order duration_ms=189 status=200
2024-12-15T14:32:01.892Z [ERROR] trace_id=abc123def456 span_id=span_003 parent=span_002 service=payment-service operation=charge_card duration_ms=2847 status=500 error=TimeoutError error_msg='Payment gateway timeout'
